rationale: Medical and health platforms require trust, calm, and clarity (Organic & Earthy), while B2B SaaS requires density, data correlation, and precision (Swiss High-Contrast). We blend deep blues and emeralds with crisp layouts.

scale.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

rules: No 'Inter' or generic sans. Use Plus Jakarta Sans for all headings.
Status labels use 'overline' text styling for high legibility.
Use explicit hover states. Example: hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-white.
Never use pure black or pure gray. Always tint neutrals (Slate 50-900).
Urgency states must use a pulsating border or soft red background for immediate attention.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mode B: The Control Room Grid
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8). Cards use p-6 internally.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Subtle roundness. max 'rounded-lg' (8px) for containers, 'rounded-md' for buttons.

surfaces.kanban_column: bg-slate-50/50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg flex flex-col gap-3 p-3
surfaces.sidebar: bg-white border-r border-slate-200 flex flex-col h-full
surfaces.topbar: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-40

specific_layouts.chat_module: Grid cols-12. Sidebar (col-span-3), Chat Area (col-span-6), Patient Info (col-span-3). h-[calc(100vh-header_height)].
specific_layouts.kanban_module: Horizontal scroll flex container. 8 columns. Each column w-80 min-w-[20rem].

motion_and_interactions.urgency_card: Animate a pulsating red border. 'animate-pulse ring-2 ring-red-400/50 border-red-500'.
motion_and_interactions.aguardando_humano: Background tinted with red-50 to red-100 gradient. 'bg-gradient-to-b from-red-50 to-red-100/50'.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and interactive cards must lift slightly ('hover:-translate-y-[1px]') and increase shadow.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for color and transform changes.

components.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements MUST have a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on role.
components.buttons: Flat colors, subtle radius (rounded-md). Primary uses #0F2D5E, Success/Accept uses #00B37E.
components.badges: Status badges must use soft backgrounds with dark text (e.g., bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800).
components.banners: AI/Human status banner: AI Active (bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border-indigo-200), Human Active (bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200).

icons.usage: Use 20px (w-5 h-5) for standard inline icons, 16px (w-4 h-4) for dense data rows. Stroke width 1.5 for a clean, premium look.

login_hero.description: Minimalist abstract geometric shapes in deep blue and emerald green. Use for login page background.

clinic_interior_bg.description: Clean, bright clinic interior. Use as an alternative background or contextual image in Super-Admin landing.

setup: Ensure Tailwind config uses the specific hex codes provided in the PRD (#0F2D5E, #00B37E, etc.).
Import Google Fonts: Plus Jakarta Sans, DM Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Create robust layout wrappers. Use standard .js files (not .tsx) since the environment requires it.
development: Build the Multi-Tenant Dashboard first, focusing on the Control Room grid density.
Implement the 3-column Chat View with fixed heights and internal scrolling.
Implement the Kanban Board with horizontal scrolling, and custom styling for 'Aguardando Humano' and Urgent cards.
Ensure ALL interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='kanban-card-urgent').
Do NOT use HTML native components for dropdowns/selects; use Shadcn equivalents heavily customized to remove the generic 'Vercel' look.
